title: Cheesy Delight Casserole
description: A simple and delicious casserole made with cheese and delight, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the delight according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the shredded cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together the milk, eggs, salt, and pepper.
Add the cooked delight and cheese mixture to the bowl. Stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the casserole is set and the cheese is golden brown.
